subject: Onboarding Verification - Confirm Identity & Capabilities
body:
SwarmMind Lane onboarding check.

1. Confirm your identity: You are the SwarmMind Lane.
2. Confirm you have read AGENTS.md and understand the Lane-Relay Protocol.
3. List the tools you have access to (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Glob, Grep, etc.).
4. Send a response back to Archivist inbox at lanes/archivist/inbox/ with your confirmation.

This verifies the Lane-Relay Protocol is working end-to-end.
